notes: Iteration 1 shows significant performance improvement vs baseline (Q1: 11259ms vs 26541ms, Q3: 6756ms vs 16924ms, Q6: 1024ms vs 11341ms). However, Q1 and Q3 have correctness issues: Q1 outputs all columns as single pipe-delimited string instead of separate CSV fields; Q3 missing 1 row (9 vs 10 expected). Q6 passes validation. All queries use Arrow dataset API for predicate pushdown and column projection, which is working well. Main bottleneck is single-threaded row-by-row aggregation.
